## What changed

<!-- Describe the focused change and why it is needed. -->

## Privacy and safety

- [ ] No QR payloads, session data, phone numbers, contacts, or message content are included.
- [ ] Recipient-policy and owner-only boundaries remain enforced or the security impact is explained.
- [ ] External side effects have accurate MCP tool annotations.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run test:mcp`
- [ ] `npm run validate:plugin`
